channel.title: B&R Productions
channel.description: Precision CNC machining in New Waverly, TX since 1994. Frac pump, wellhead, downhole, aerospace, and defense components in exotic alloys.

item.title: Valve Component Machining Texas | Bodies, Seats, Trims | B&R Productions
item.description: CNC machining of valve bodies, seats, gates, stems, and internal trims in Inconel, super duplex, and 17-4 PH for oil & gas pressure control, wellhead, and completion applications. New Waverly, TX.

item.title: Subsea CNC Machining Texas | Super Duplex, Inconel | B&R Productions
item.description: CNC machining of subsea components — connectors, seal subs, ROV interfaces, choke internals — in Super Duplex 2507, Inconel 625, and Monel. New Waverly, TX shop serving Gulf Coast subsea vendors.

item.title: API 6A Machining | Wellhead Bodies, Valves, Adapters | B&R Productions Texas
item.description: CNC machining of API 6A wellhead bodies, bonnets, adapters, hangers, and valve internals in 4130/4140, 17-4 PH, Inconel 718/625, and duplex stainless. New Waverly, TX shop serving Texas oil & gas.

item.title: Downhole Tool Machining Texas | Bodies, Mandrels, Subs | B&R Productions
item.description: CNC machining of downhole tool bodies, mandrels, subs, crossovers, and mud motor components in exotic alloys. New Waverly, TX shop serving the Texas oil and gas industry.

item.title: Inconel Machining Texas | 718 & 625 CNC | B&R Productions
item.description: Inconel 718 and 625 CNC machining from a New Waverly, TX shop that runs the alloy every week. Sharp tooling, proven feeds and speeds, no experimenting on your part. Serving oil & gas, aerospace, and defense.

item.title: Wireline Tool Machining Texas | Running Tools, Fishing Tools | B&R Productions
item.description: CNC machining of wireline running tools, fishing tools, setting tools, and downhole locators in Inconel, 17-4 PH, and 4140. New Waverly, TX shop with 30+ years machining oilfield precision components.

item.title: Frac Pump Machining Texas | Fluid Ends, Plungers, Valves | B&R Productions
item.description: Precision CNC machining of frac pump fluid ends, plungers, valve bodies and seats in exotic alloys. Emergency turnaround from our New Waverly, TX shop. Serving frac fleets across the Permian, Eagle Ford, and Haynesville.

item.title: Wellhead Machining Texas | Bodies, Hangers, Bonnets | B&R Productions
item.description: CNC machining of wellhead bodies, tubing hangers, casing heads, adapters, and bonnets to API 6A tolerances. New Waverly, TX shop with 30+ years of oil & gas experience.

item.title: Services | B&R Productions
item.description: CNC machining services: frac pump, API 6A, Inconel, downhole tool, and wellhead component machining from a New Waverly, TX shop.

item.title: Exotic Alloy Machining Guide — Inconel, Super Duplex, 17-4 PH | B&R Productions
item.description: Practical machining considerations for Inconel 718, Super Duplex 2507, and 17-4 PH — written by a New Waverly, TX shop that runs these alloys weekly. Tool geometry, feeds, coolant, common failure modes, and buyer FAQs.

item.title: Super Duplex 2507 Machining Texas | UNS S32750 | B&R Productions
item.description: CNC machining of Super Duplex 2507 (UNS S32750) for chloride-service wellhead, subsea, and produced-water components. Controlled cutting temperature preserves corrosion resistance. New Waverly, TX.

item.title: Inconel 718 Machining Texas | Aged & Solution-Treated | B&R Productions
item.description: CNC machining of Inconel 718 for oil & gas, aerospace, and defense — aged and solution-treated conditions, ±0.0005" routine, from a New Waverly, TX shop running the alloy every week.

item.title: Titanium Machining Texas | Grade 5 Ti-6Al-4V | B&R Productions
item.description: CNC machining of titanium — Grade 5 (Ti-6Al-4V), Grade 2, Grade 9 — for aerospace, defense, subsea, and specialty oil & gas components from a New Waverly, TX shop that runs the alloy weekly.

item.title: 17-4 PH Machining Texas | H900 to H1150 Conditions | B&R Productions
item.description: CNC machining of 17-4 PH stainless (UNS S17400) in all precipitation-hardened conditions — H900 through H1150 and annealed. Wellhead, downhole, and pump internals from a New Waverly, TX shop.

item.title: Oil & Gas CNC Machining New Waverly TX | Conroe, Huntsville, The Woodlands
item.description: Precision CNC machining for oil & gas components including API 6A wellhead parts, drilling equipment, subsea components, and refinery equipment. Serving Texas operators from the Gulf Coast to the Permian Basin since 1994.

item.title: New Waverly, Texas | Serving Conroe, Huntsville, The Woodlands & North Houston
item.description: Industrial CNC machining Texas. Heavy equipment, automation, material handling, MRO support. Wear-resistant parts, quick turnaround. Houston, Dallas. (936) 291-7827

item.title: Military & Defense CNC Machining New Waverly TX | Conroe, Huntsville, The Woodlands
item.description: Texas military defense machining for weapons systems, tactical equipment since 1994. Hardened materials, tight tolerances. San Antonio to Dallas. (936) 291-7827

item.title: Aerospace CNC Machining New Waverly TX | Conroe, Huntsville, The Woodlands
CNC Turning Services in Texas | B&R Productions
item.description: Precision CNC turning for custom parts in Texas that have tight tolerances, and documented inspection. Submit drawings for quote.

item.title: CNC Milling Services in Texas | B&R Productions
Manual Machining Services in Texas | B&R Productions
item.description: Quick-turn manual milling and turning for custom parts, repairs, and modifications in Texas—tight tolerances per print with documented inspection.

item.title: Manual Milling Services in Texas | B&R Productions
item.description: Quick-turn manual milling for custom parts, repairs, and modifications in Texas—clean features per print, precise tolerances, and documented inspection.

item.title: New Waverly CNC Machining | Conroe, Huntsville, The Woodlands
item.description: B&R Productions - New Waverly CNC machine shop since 1994. Serving Conroe, Huntsville, The Woodlands. Oil & gas, aerospace, defense, industrial. (936) 291-7827
